description_long: This is a pair of modern, geometric drop earrings featuring two flat, circular discs connected by a small hinge or link. The upper disc is smaller and attaches to the earlobe, while the larger lower disc dangles freely below. Both discs have a highly polished, metallic finish, giving them a sleek and reflective appearance. The earrings are symmetrical and minimalist, with no visible engravings, gemstones, or additional ornamentation. The connecting mechanism and posts are also metallic, designed for pierced ears. The overall design emphasizes clean lines and a contemporary aesthetic, suitable for urban fashion.
description: A pair of sleek, metallic drop earrings with two connected circular discs in a minimalist, geometric style. The polished surfaces and simple design create a modern, reflective look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile of the earrings and the protruding posts for ear attachment.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both earrings' flat, circular faces and their symmetrical, geometric design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and the posts for ear insertion.
description_view_3: Alternate front view, nearly identical to view 1, showing the clean, polished surfaces of the discs.
